start.speaker: Watchful, the Porter
start.text: Peace, pilgrim. This house was built by the Lord of the hill for the relief and security of pilgrims. Whence come you, and whither are you bound?
start.text_zh: 平安，朝圣者。这house是山之主为朝圣者的歇息与稳妥所建。你从哪里来，要往哪里去？

choices.text: From the City of Destruction; I am going to the Celestial City.
choices.text_zh: 从将亡之城来；我要往天城去。

choices.text: May I rest here? Night is coming and the way has been long.
choices.text_zh: 我可以在此歇息吗？夜将至，路已远。

reply.speaker: Watchful, the Porter
reply.text: Stay then till morning. I will call the damsels of the house — Discretion, Prudence, Piety and Charity — to speak with you, and they will show you the armoury before you go down to the valley.
reply.text_zh: 那就住到天明。我去叫这家的姑娘——明辨、谨慎、虔诚、仁爱——来与你交谈；下到幽谷之前，她们会带你看那军械库。

choices.text: Thank you. I will gladly speak with them.
choices.text_zh: 谢谢。我很乐意与她们交谈。
